export const transactionCategories = [
  'salary',
  'freelance',
  'food',
  'travel',
  'bills',
  'housing',
  'shopping',
  'health',
  'education',
  'entertainment',
  'transport',
  'investment',
  'insurance',
  'tax',
  'gift',
  'utilities',
  'savings',
  'other',
];

export const paymentMethods = ['cash', 'card', 'bank_transfer', 'upi', 'wallet', 'other'];

export const monthOptions = Array.from({ length: 12 }, (_, index) => index + 1);
